meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: A Freelancer’s Guide to Faster Shipping
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline your workflow and ship client projects with speed.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. Focus on integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your existing terminal workflow. By treating AI as an autonomous pair programmer rather than a chatbot, you eliminate context switching, resolve bugs in seconds, and reclaim your billable hours for high-value architectural decisions instead of syntax errors.
content.intro:
The modern freelance stack has become a graveyard of abandoned AI subscriptions. You open your IDE, ping three different LLMs, search through documentation, and realize two hours have vanished without a single commit. The cognitive load is crushing, and your velocity is stalling.

But the best builders don't use more tools; they use better workflows. By integrating Claude Code’s CLI capabilities with Antigravity’s structural analysis, you transform your terminal into a high-octane debugging engine. This isn't just about fixing code—it's about building a repeatable system that allows you to ship production-ready features while your competitors are still prompting in a browser tab.

steps.title: Establish the Context Baseline
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with a clear map of your codebase to prevent hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify the primary entry points and dependency graph.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the stack trace to the exact line of code causing the bottleneck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan for potential race conditions or unhandled promise rejections in the current module.

steps.title: Automated Remediation
steps.description: Apply a targeted fix to the isolated area without refactoring the entire architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a patch for the identified bug that adheres to existing project patterns and style guidelines.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file ./src/auth.ts --reason 'Fixing undefined reference in user object'

steps.title: Verification and Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break peripheral features by running contextual tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent changes and propose three edge-case tests to ensure stability.

steps.title: Commit and Document
steps.description: Automatically generate a professional commit message and documentation update based on the fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the bug fix and its impact for the changelog in professional technical documentation format.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m 'feat: resolve async race condition in auth flow'

pro_tips: Always set your Claude Code 'personality' to 'Senior Staff Engineer' to force more concise, high-level architectural output.
Use Antigravity to generate custom linting rules based on your specific client's coding standards to prevent bugs before they happen.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to reduce friction during high-pressure client deployments.
When debugging complex state, ask the AI to map the state transition diagram before writing any code to ensure logic integrity.
Periodically clear your context window in Claude Code to force the agent to re-scan the file system for the latest changes.
content.next_steps: Now that your debugging pipeline is automated, integrate these steps into a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to catch bugs during every push.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical authority to handle any codebase with surgical precision. Stop struggling with manual debugging and start building like a principal engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
